headline: Sentiment down 60% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 64% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 122 quotes and 95 at strong intensity, showing people are venting intensely despite the score dropping from yesterday's peak.

• At 36.5, frustration levels remain well above the typical range but have cooled significantly from yesterday's 58.5.

• Optimism plunged to -18.9 from yesterday's -1.3, with 30 strong-intensity quotes suggesting active disappointment rather than mere quiet.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
